#### simple resorce pack for decoration with tech
##### this is teardown style / voxel style textures for decoration and hats
##### here is an example for decoration

![no](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EV5gj9OS/images/dfb19df09c29ec458c14137e40c32eedc31a99af.png)
###### light not inculded

---

<details>
<summary>versions give commands</summary>

## version 0.0.1 : from 1001 - 1033
##### /give @p firework_star{CustomModelData:1001} 1 - /give @p firework_star{CustomModelData:1033} 1 
---
## version 0.0.2 - version 0.0.3 : from 1001 - 1039
##### /give @p firework_star{CustomModelData:1001} 1 - /give @p firework_star{CustomModelData:1039} 1

## version 0.0.4 : from 1001 - 1046
##### /give @p firework_star{CustomModelData:1001} 1 - /give @p firework_star{CustomModelData:1046} 1 
---
##### all versions have phone with the same give command : 
##### /give @p minecraft:carrot_on_a_stick{CustomModelData:1000} 1
